captured_via: mcp__supabase__execute_sql (read-only) against net._http_response on project inlagtgpynemhipnqvty
query: SELECT id, status_code, content_type, content::text AS content_full, error_msg, created FROM net._http_response ORDER BY created DESC LIMIT 3

responses.interpretation: notify-job-filled Edge Function executed successfully, queried applications by job_id, found 2 applicants in NOTIFY_STATUSES (existing seeker in 'applied' + new seeker A in 'shortlisted'), called Resend twice, both succeeded. Job_id matches test_setup.json. sent:2 matches the expected partition (3 NOTIFY pre-fire minus 1 'offered' transitioned to 'hired' during fire = 2 receivers).

responses.verdict: FAIL (historical) — second-fire response, captured for traceability
responses.interpretation: Second fire (post-022 + vault-populated) reached the Supabase Edge Functions gateway but was rejected with UNAUTHORIZED_LEGACY_JWT. Root cause: legacy HS256 service_role JWT no longer accepted by gateway for verify_jwt:true functions. Resolved by setting verify_jwt:false on notify-job-filled in supabase/config.toml and redeploying (commit pending — Task 4 atomic commit). Phase 18: investigate JWT signing key migration to restore defence-in-depth.

test_context.fire_method: Path B — direct Studio SQL UPDATE (race-fix order: applications.status='hired' for dd396022, then jobs.status='filled' for b00254c7)
test_context.fire_method_rationale: Path A (MarkFilledModal UI) was abandoned after first fire surfaced (a) modal applicant labels show only #<8-char-uuid> with no name/status context — easy mis-click; (b) modal performs UPDATE applications and UPDATE jobs as separate non-transactional PostgREST calls — left orphan-hired application when trigger errored

bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.failure: function net.http_post(url=>text, headers=>jsonb, body=>text) does not exist
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.root_cause: pg_net 0.20.0 only exposes body jsonb; migration 017 used legacy `body := payload::text`
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.side_effects: left application 2a91e3db in orphan 'hired' state due to modal's non-atomic UPDATE sequence (subsequently restored via Studio SQL)

bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.failure: null value in column "url" of relation "http_request_queue" violates not-null constraint
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.root_cause: vault.secrets was empty — vault.decrypted_secrets lookup for 'supabase_url' returned NULL, NULL || '/functions/v1/notify-job-filled' = NULL (Postgres NULL propagation)
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.fix: vault.create_secret() for both supabase_url and service_role_key in Studio (one-off, never committed)

bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.method: Path B — direct Studio SQL (post-022, post-vault-populated)
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.failure: 401 UNAUTHORIZED_LEGACY_JWT from Supabase Edge Functions gateway
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.root_cause: Service_role JWT is legacy HS256 format; Supabase migrated this project's gateway to require non-legacy JWTs at some point between 017 deploy and 2026-05-03
bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.fix: verify_jwt:false in supabase/config.toml for notify-job-filled and send-followup-emails; redeploy via supabase functions deploy --use-api

bugs_diagnosed_per_iteration.method: Path B — direct Studio SQL (post-022, post-vault-populated, post-verify_jwt:false)
